message:
feat: extend fork command argument parser with additional option handling

Further expansion of fork management CLI options from concurrent agent:
- Add handling for additional fork command arguments (5 new lines)
- Refine option validation flow for fork-* subcommands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7475,7 +7475,11 @@ parse_args() {
                 shift
                 ;;
             --rebase)
-                UPDATE_STRATEGY="rebase"
+                if [[ "$COMMAND" == fork-status || "$COMMAND" == fork-sync || "$COMMAND" == fork-clean ]]; then
+                    ARGS+=("$1")
+                else
+                    UPDATE_STRATEGY="rebase"
+                fi
                 shift
                 ;;
             --dir)
